name: Japan Power Fastening Co.,Ltd.
summary: Japan Power Fastening Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of fasteners and related tools in Japan. Its fasteners and related tools are used in residential and general construction, and civil engineering, including prefabricated housing applications. The company also manufactures and sells parts for automobiles and home appliances; and leases real estate properties. Japan Power Fastening Co., Ltd. was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
